author: Aaij, Roel and others
title: Search for the lepton flavour violating decay $B^+ \rightarrow K^+ \mu^- \tau^+$ using $B_{s2}^{*0}$ decays
abstract: a search for the lepton ﬂavour violating decay $B^+ \to K^+ \mu^- \tau^+$ using a sample of proton–proton collisions at centre-of-mass energies of 7, 8, and 13 TeV, corresponding to a total integrated luminosity of 9 fb$^{−1}$
